title: User Web Logs
description: User web activity timeline from Zscaler logs showing browsing history, recent details and session context for investigation and threat hunting.
query:
let user= "user@company.com";
let startTime ago(1d);//datetime(2026-03-1 00:00:00);
let endTime =now()://datetime(2026-03-31 23:59:59);
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated between (startTime ..endTime)
| where DeviceVendor - "Zscaler" 
| where DeviceProduct "NSSWeblog" 
| where SourceUserName =~ user
| extend RefererHost = extract@"erefererhost=([^; ]+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| extend Uripath - extract@"eurIpath=([^;]+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| extend UrlCategory = extract@"urlsupercat=([^;]+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| project
TimeGenerated, SourceUserName, SourceIP, DestinationHostName, RequestURL, UrlPath,
RefererHost,Urlcategory,RequestMethod, DeviceAction, RequestClientApplication, SentBytes,
ReceivedBytes
| order by TimeGenerated asc
